servicePrincipals.//: Service principals / apps that should be able to use the workshop resources. Replace objectId with a real Entra service-principal (or app) object id. principalType is usually 'ServicePrincipal'. Find one with: az ad sp show --id <appId> --query id -o tsv. Leave the array empty to grant nothing.

resourceAccess.//: Part C — the level of access service principals / apps receive at the resource group scope. Default: Contributor = manage/use every resource in the workshop RG. Built-in Contributor id: b24988ac-6180-42a0-9c14-49b21d8d3a83.
